mapper.select: select last_execute_result as result, count(1) as cnt from functional_case where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0 and latest = 1 group by last_execute_result
select last_exec_result as result, count(1) as cnt from test_plan_functional_case where test_plan_id = #{planId} group by last_exec_result

select id as caseId, num, name, last_execute_result as lastExecResult from functional_case where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0 and latest = 1 and last_execute_result in ('ERROR', 'BLOCKED', 'FAKE_ERROR') order by update_time desc limit 200

select fc.id as caseId, fc.num, fc.name, tpf.last_exec_result as lastExecResult from test_plan_functional_case tpf inner join functional_case fc on fc.id = tpf.functional_case_id where tpf.test_plan_id = #{planId} and tpf.last_exec_result in ('ERROR', 'BLOCKED', 'FAKE_ERROR') order by tpf.last_exec_time desc limit 200

select ifnull(nullif(b.handle_user, ''), '-') as handleUser, ifnull(u.name, ifnull(nullif(b.handle_user, ''), '-')) as handleUserName, ifnull(b.status, '-') as status, ifnull(si.name, ifnull(b.status, '-')) as statusName, count(distinct b.id) as count from bug_relation_case brc inner join bug b on b.id = brc.bug_id and b.deleted = 0 left join user u on u.id = b.handle_user left join status_item si on si.id = b.status where brc.test_plan_id = #{planId} group by b.handle_user, u.name, b.status, si.name order by count desc limit 200

select ifnull(nullif(t.type_value, ''), '未分类') as type, count(distinct b.id) as count from bug_relation_case brc inner join bug b on b.id = brc.bug_id and b.deleted = 0 left join ( select bcf.bug_id, bcf.value as type_value from bug_custom_field bcf inner join custom_field cf on cf.id = bcf.field_id and cf.name = 'bug_type' ) t on t.bug_id = b.id where brc.test_plan_id = #{planId} group by ifnull(nullif(t.type_value, ''), '未分类') order by count desc limit 100
